title: The Big Data Analytics Process for Book Data
description: A flowchart illustrating the end-to-end process of analyzing book data using big data analytics techniques, from raw data ingestion to actionable insights.
elements: Data Sources (e.g., Sales Records, Reviews, Digital Reading Metrics)
Analytical Models (Recommendation Engines, Trend Analysis, Sentiment Analysis)
Actionable Insights (Personalization, Inventory Management, Marketing Strategy)
relationships: Data flows from Sources to Ingestion
Ingested data is processed by Analytical Models
Processed data is used for Visualization
